brand_dna.category: Modern handcrafted furniture and homeware for calm, lived-in UK interiors.
brand_dna.core_belief: Good design should compliment the moments of an unhurried life - not a compromise, not a splurge.
proof_points: Made to order in 6 to 8 weeks
Everything made locally by designers who 'have been at this a good long while'
Complimentary fabric swatch box delivered direct to you
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, understated designer furniture - form and calm over statement and excess.

voice_pillars.name: Calm and Unhurried
voice_pillars.desc: Writes for slowness and rest, framing furniture around quiet moments rather than urgency.
voice_pillars.quote: We make furniture and homeware for an unhurried way of life.

voice_pillars.name: Warm and Lived-In
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to real, cosy homes and the feeling of belonging somewhere that's genuinely yours.
voice_pillars.quote: For us, home is the lived-in version.

voice_pillars.name: Quietly Confident Design
voice_pillars.desc: Favours intentional form and restraint, letting the design speak without shouting.

voice_pillars.name: Considered and Enduring
voice_pillars.desc: Emphasises craft, longevity and pieces built to last and grow with a home.

phrases: A place for unplanned get togethers

icp: Design-conscious UK homeowners who value calm, quality and craft, and will invest in furniture that fits the home they already have and lasts for years.

personas.name: Slow Living Nester
personas.description: Someone building a cosy, lived-in home who is moved by comfort, calm and 'life's slow moments'.

personas.name: Considered Design Buyer
personas.description: An interiors-led shopper who values intentional form and restraint and responds to 'simplicity, done exceptionally well'.

personas.name: Trade and Interior Pro
personas.description: Designers and specifiers (via the Trade Application) who need locally made, made-to-order pieces with reliable dimensions and quality.

offers: Complimentary fabric swatch box delivered direct to you
Made to order in 6 to 8 weeks
Use Your Own Fabric option on furniture
Newsletter sign-up for products, events and interior design tips

allowed.claim: Handcrafted furniture made to order in 6 to 8 weeks.
Everything made locally by our designers.
Order complimentary fabric swatches delivered to you.
Option to use your own fabric.

banned.claim: The best furniture in the UK / #1 designer sofas.
banned.why: FTC substantiation - unqualified superlative that cannot be proven.
Guaranteed-results claim not supported by any stated warranty on the site.

banned.claim: Only a few left - order in the next hour.
banned.why: Fake urgency; made-to-order model with no stated stock limits.

banned.claim: Rated 5 stars by thousands of happy customers.
banned.why: Invented review counts and endorsements - no reviews found on site.
FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim; site only says 'sustainably soft'.

banned.claim: Cloud-like cushioning that eliminates back pain.
banned.why: Unsubstantiated health claim beyond comfort language on site.
